sowing.method: Planting of 9-12 month old seedbed saplings in prepared pits

seed_rate.notes: 150-180 seedlings per hectare under square planting layout.

sowing.soil_conditions: Sandy loam, alluvial, and red loamy coastal soils with good drainage.

irrigation.notes: Irrigate newly planted saplings every 2-3 days in summer.
Ensure consistent drip irrigation in basin areas.
Provide deep soaking during winter dry intervals.

fertilizer.notes: Apply first fertilizer dose 3 months after planting, mixed with compost.
Apply during monsoon recess to support robust stem and leaf structure.

maturity_indicators: Nuts turn brown and husk becomes dry (fully mature)
Water level inside nut decreases producing a hollow sound when shaken
harvest.harvest_method: Manual tree climbing or harvesting using long pole knives
harvest.notes: For copra production, store harvested nuts for 1 month before dehusking.
